case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIO JOSE DIAZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIO JOSE DIAZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,943.38 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, MARIO JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
